label: The Lensing Store
description: The Lensing Store serves as the Prismatic Draught’s controlled repository for kegs, casks, and sealed dry goods, laid out on fused-silicate racks raised above the open grounding gutters. Its walls are faced with matte vitrified tiles to blunt stray refraction, while a single cistern panel admits the tavern’s copper-white twilight in a narrow, calibrated band for inventory reading. Overhead mirror slats repeat the auroral alignment in a subdued grid, keeping the room uniformly lit without glare. The floor is scored metalwork set to shed abrasive glass dust into a shallow settling channel that runs the room’s length.
